title: Data inventory first
description: Identify personal-data fields, sources, stores, processors, logs, exports, and deletion paths before editing privacy-sensitive behavior.
body: Use when a change touches user profiles, accounts, health, payment, analytics, support tooling, telemetry, uploads, identifiers, or data retention. Do not use to declare legal compliance or choose lawful basis; that needs accountable human authority. Actions: map collection point, purpose, storage, derived copies, log sinks, external sharing, and deletion/export paths before proposing code. Validation signals include a reviewed data-flow map, changed tests for affected stores, and no untracked sink remaining. Risk boundary: unknown personal-data flow, new sharing destination, or regulated data class requires a human gate.
